prompt: When synthesis confirms pressure edge, choose raise.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when risk premium and stack context support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits the tournament cue set, so the line uses pressure only when the read gives you a real leverage edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is better when the ICM synthesis read gives you the pressure edge, because covering leverage and fold equity let you attack instead of taking a passive line.
